data.title: Terraform co-founder gets 15-year prison term after plea; Judge listens to victims before sentencing.
data.description: A federal judge listened to testimony from numerous victims of Terraform Labs and Do Kwon for several hours before reaching a sentencing decision for the co-founder.

data.title: TTEC named Major Contender in Everest Group's 2025 Sales Services PEAK Matrix Assessment for B2B & B2C.
data.description: TTEC has earned the title of Major Contender in the 2025 Everest Group Sales Services (B2B & B2C) PEAK Matrix® Assessment, cementing its position in the competitive landscape. This recognition underscores TTEC's prominence in the industry and highlights its exceptional performance and capabilities.

data.title: DIRTT secures C$15.0 million loan from BDC for refinancing, strengthening financial position.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on December 11, 2025, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. shared that they signed a letter agreement with the Business Development Bank of Canada. Under the agreement, BDC agreed to provide a loan of up to C$15.0 million to DIRTT. This financial assistance is subject to specific conditions that need to be met by the Company.

data.title: Alpine Banks of Colorado to repurchase up to $5 million of its Class B voting common stock.
data.description: The holding company for Alpine Bank, Alpine Banks of Colorado, headquartered in Glenwood Springs, Colorado, disclosed on December 11, 2025, that its board of directors has sanctioned a stock repurchase initiative. Under this program, Alpine is authorized to buy back a maximum of $5 million worth of its Class B voting common stock that is currently in circulation.

data.title: Voltagrid and Halliburton commit 400 MW to power data centers, aiming for sustainable energy solutions in the Eastern Hemisphere.
data.description: In Houston, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) and VoltaGrid have achieved a major milestone in their partnership with the confirmation of manufacturing orders for 400 megawatts (MW) of modular natural gas power systems. These systems are scheduled for delivery in 2028 and will be utilized to aid in the establishment of data centers in various locations across the Eastern Hemisphere. This joint commitment signifies a dedication to providing cutting-edge and environmentally friendly energy solutions to address the changing needs of global infrastructure.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: VNDA) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed its participation in the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2026, in San Francisco, California. The company, listed as VNDA on the Nasdaq, will conduct a corporate presentation at 9:00.

data.title: Pro Music Rights & Music Licensing, Inc. consider legal action due to false statements by Rep. Fitzgerald & PROs for market monopolization.
data.description: In Miami, FL on December 11, 2025, Music Licensing, Inc. and its subsidiary, Pro Music Rights (PMR), revealed plans to pursue legal action following alleged defamatory remarks by Representative Scott Fitzgerald. They also accuse incumbent performing rights organizations and industry lobbying groups of collaborating to stifle competitive ventures in the American music licensing sector. The organizations are contemplating legal recourse due to what they perceive as a coordinated effort to hinder their operations.

data.title: Brixton Metals completes second round of private placement.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2% from the previous quarter, reaching a new high of 8.5%. This surge in unemployment has affected approximately 1.5 million individuals, bringing the total number of unemployed people to 3.7 million. The government has announced plans to implement new policies aimed at addressing this issue and providing support to those without jobs. Additionally, businesses across various sectors have been struggling, with over 10,000 companies filing for bankruptcy in the past month alone. Experts warn that if the situation does not improve soon, there could be further economic challenges ahead for the country.

data.title: Granite (NYSE:GVA) declares quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share, payable on Jan 15, 2026, to shareholders as of Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Granite (NYSE:GVA) based in Watsonville, California, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per common share, payable on January 15, 2026. Shareholders of record by December 31, 2025, are eligible. Established in 1922, Granite is known as America’s Infrastructure Company™ and is among the leading diversified construction and construction materials firms in the U.S.

data.title: Universidad de Monterrey wins 1st in CME Group's 22nd University Trading Challenge with over 615 teams from 25 countries.
data.description: The University of Monterrey claimed the top spot, along with two other non-U.S. teams, in the top five of a competition that saw a remarkable participation of more than 615 teams from 25 different countries. The event took place in Chicago on December 11, 2025, and was organized by CME Group, the prominent derivatives marketplace worldwide.

data.title: S&P 500 hits all-time high after overcoming Oracle earnings worry, just enough to turn around downturn.
data.description: The S&P 500 index experienced a slight increase as investors overlooked worries regarding Oracle's earnings. The rise was marginal but significant enough to make an impact.

data.title: Health Union launches ATTR-Amyloidosis.net offering rare disease resources and peer support for patients & caregivers. Dec 11, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: A recently launched digital health community is providing essential resources and peer support for individuals affected by ATTR Amyloidosis, a rare disease. Health Union, a prominent digital health organization specializing in online community activation and data, unveiled this initiative in Philadelphia on December 11, 2025. This platform aims to offer assistance to ATTR Amyloidosis patients and their caregivers, emphasizing the importance of connecting with others facing similar challenges. This venture seeks to enhance the quality of life for individuals dealing with this condition, catering to the unique needs of the community.

data.title: Yale QB Brogan McCaughey (6'2 ½", 215 lbs) enters NCAA transfer portal with two years left.
data.description: In New Haven, Connecticut on December 11, 2025, Brogan McCaughey, a 6'2 ½" and 215 lbs quarterback at Yale University majoring in Political Science, declared his intention to enter the NCAA transfer portal. McCaughey, who is scheduled to graduate this month, is now open to joining a different program for his collegiate football career.
Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc.
Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by Banco BTG Pactual S.A., its parent holding companies, and subsidiary, BTG Pactual Bancorp, LLC

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group urges CIOs to redefine IT's brand as data shows 53% of CxOs expect IT to transform organizations.
data.description: Even with the increasing importance of IT in organizational strategy, recent research by Info-Tech Research Group uncovers ongoing perception disparities hindering CIO effectiveness and perpetuating antiquated beliefs about IT. Statistics from the group's diagnostics indicate that 53% of CxOs anticipate IT to facilitate expansion or transformation...

data.title: Comtech adds Mary Jane Raymond to Board of Directors, now 8 directors. She has 30+ years of finance, governance experience.
data.description: Chandler, Arizona- On December 11, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) named Mary Jane Raymond as an independent director, expanding its Board to eight members. Ms. Raymond brings over 30 years of expertise in public company finance and governance. Comtech is a global leader in communications technology.

data.title: The Joint Corp. sells 22 clinics in Southeast, terminates APA for 45 in California to franchise owners.
data.description: Buyers from the southeastern region who have previously been affiliated with franchise businesses are now expanding their ownership. This move is contributing to the growth of the franchise community in the area, with a significant number of individuals increasing their ownership stakes.

data.title: OceanPal Inc. will pay accrued dividends in tender offer for 7.0% Series D Preferred Stock.
data.description: In Athens, Greece on December 11th, 2025, OceanPal Inc. (NASDAQ: SVRN) disclosed its intention to acquire all remaining shares of its 7.0% Series D Cumulative Convertible Perpetual Preferred Stock. Each share, valued at $0.01, is being offered for $1,000 as part of the acquisition deal.

data.title: TriNet (NYSE: TNET) announces quarterly dividend of $0.275/share for common stock. Board of Directors approved.
data.description: In Dublin, California on December 11, 2025, TriNet (NYSE: TNET), a prominent provider of HR solutions for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), declared a dividend of $0.275 per share of the company's common stock. The dividend was approved by the Board of Directors.
